scripts.supabase:sync-env:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const supaPath=path.join(root,'supabase-legal','.env');if(!fs.existsSync(supaPath)){process.stderr.write('missing supabase-legal/.env
');process.exit(1);}const text=fs.readFileSync(supaPath,'utf8');const vars={};for(const line of text.split(/?
/)){if(!line||/^\s*#/.test(line))continue;const i=line.indexOf('=');if(i<0)continue;vars[line.slice(0,i).trim()]=line.slice(i+1).trim();}const url=vars.SUPABASE_PUBLIC_URL||'http://localhost:8000';const anon=vars.ANON_KEY||'';const service=vars.SERVICE_ROLE_KEY||'';const worker=vars.WORKER_SECRET||'dev-secret';const dst=path.join(root,'apps','web','.env.local');const basePath=path.join(root,'apps','web','.env.local.example');const base=fs.existsSync(basePath)?fs.readFileSync(basePath,'utf8').split(/?
/):[];const out=[];const seen=new Set();const setLine=(k,v)=>{out.push(`${k}=${v}`);seen.add(k)};for(const line of base){if(!line){out.push('');continue;}if(/^\s*#/.test(line)){out.push(line);continue;}const i=line.indexOf('=');if(i<0){out.push(line);continue;}const k=line.slice(0,i).trim();if(['NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL','NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY','SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY','WORKER_SECRET'].includes(k)){continue;}out.push(line);seen.add(k);}setLine('NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL',url);setLine('NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY',anon);setLine('SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY',service);setLine('WORKER_SECRET',worker);fs.writeFileSync(dst,out.join('
').replace(/
+$/,'')+'
');"
scripts.db:migrate:local: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const run = (cmd, args) => { const r = spawnSync(cmd, args, { stdio: 'inherit' }); if (r.status !== 0) process.exit(r.status ?? 1); }; run('docker', ['cp', 'packages/db/supabase/migrations/001_init.sql', 'supabase-legal-db:/tmp/001_init.sql']); run('docker', ['compose', '-f', 'supabase-legal/docker-compose.yml', 'exec', '-T', 'db', 'psql', '-U', 'postgres', '-d', 'postgres', '-f', '/tmp/001_init.sql']);"
